nodes.name: i18n/src/index.ts
nodes.summary: i18next initialization and language resource management. Sets up i18next with en/ru/zh-CN translations, exports STORAGE_KEY_LANGUAGE and LANGUAGE_ORDER constants, provides ensureLanguageResources() for async bundle loading, and detects initial language from localStorage or browser navigator.

nodes.name: test-utils/package.json
nodes.summary: Package manifest for @code-proxy/test-utils. Declares a private utility package with ESM modules.

nodes.name: ui/package.json
nodes.summary: Package manifest for @code-proxy/ui. Lists dependencies: react, echarts, echarts-for-react, framer-motion, goey-toast, lucide-react, react-i18next, react-router-dom, @tanstack/react-virtual.

nodes.name: ui/src/charts/ChartLegend.tsx
nodes.summary: ChartLegend component renders a row of toggleable pill buttons for chart series. Each item has a colored dot, label, and click-to-toggle behavior.

nodes.name: ChartLegend
nodes.summary: Renders a flex-wrap row of toggleable legend pill buttons for ECharts series toggling.

nodes.name: ChartLegendItem
nodes.summary: Interface defining shape of a legend item with key, label, colorClass, enabled state, and onToggle callback.

nodes.name: ui/src/charts/EChart.tsx
nodes.summary: Lazy-loaded wrapper for EChartRenderer. Uses React.Suspense and lazy() to defer loading the echarts renderer bundle until first use.

nodes.name: EChart
nodes.summary: Suspense-wrapped lazy EChart component with overflow control.

nodes.name: ui/src/charts/EChartRenderer.tsx
nodes.summary: ECharts renderer component with custom resize handling via ResizeObserver, requestAnimationFrame batching, and theme support from ThemeProvider. Dispatches resize also on window resize, orientation change, and visual viewport events.

nodes.name: EChartRenderer
nodes.summary: Renders ReactECharts with auto-resize, theme support, animation-frame-batched resize events, and chart instance management.

nodes.name: ui/src/data-table/DataTable.tsx
nodes.summary: Main DataTable component implementing a feature-rich virtualized table with: column resize by dragging right edge, column reorder by drag handle, column width/order persistence to localStorage, scrollbar thumb rendering, infinite scroll with bottom callback, loading/empty states, and row virtualization via @tanstack/react-virtual.

nodes.name: DataTable
nodes.summary: Generic virtualized DataTable component with column resize, reorder, localStorage persistence, infinite scroll, and custom scrollbar thumbs.

nodes.name: ui/src/data-table/DataTable.types.ts
nodes.summary: Type definitions for DataTableColumn and DataTableProps interfaces, separated for independent export.

nodes.name: ui/src/data-table/index.ts
nodes.summary: Barrel re-export file for data-table module, exporting DataTable, DataTableColumn, DataTableProps, TableCellOverflowTooltip, extractTableCellTextContent.

nodes.name: ui/src/data-table/TableCellOverflowTooltip.tsx
nodes.summary: TableCellOverflowTooltip component that truncates cell content with an overflow tooltip. Extracts text content from React children recursively and detects managed tooltips to avoid nesting.

nodes.name: TableCellOverflowTooltip
nodes.summary: Renders truncated table cell content with OverflowTooltip when content overflows its container.

nodes.name: extractTableCellTextContent
nodes.summary: Recursively extracts plain text from ReactNode tree for tooltip display.

nodes.name: ui/src/data-table/tableStorage.ts
nodes.summary: Table storage utilities: column width persistence (localStorage), column resize state machine, column reorder state machine, scroll metrics calculation, scrollbar thumb sizing, and column-level operators for resize/reorder/lock logic.

nodes.name: ui/src/feedback/AnimatedNumber.tsx
nodes.summary: AnimatedNumber component animates numeric value changes with easing. Uses requestAnimationFrame, respects prefers-reduced-motion, and renders formatted output via a format function.

nodes.name: AnimatedNumber
nodes.summary: Animates between numeric values using cubic ease-out interpolation via requestAnimationFrame.

nodes.name: ui/src/feedback/EmptyState.tsx
nodes.summary: EmptyState component renders a centered placeholder with optional icon, title, description, and action button for empty list states.

nodes.name: EmptyState
nodes.summary: Renders an empty state placeholder with optional title, description, icon, and action.

nodes.name: ui/src/feedback/Reveal.tsx
nodes.summary: Reveal component applies a fade-in + translate-up animation on mount using requestAnimationFrame.

nodes.name: Reveal
nodes.summary: Animates children with fade-in and slight upward translation on initial mount.

nodes.name: ui/src/feedback/ToastProvider.css
nodes.summary: CSS overrides for goey-toast library: max-width constraints, text overflow ellipsis for titles, white-space pre-line for descriptions.

nodes.name: ui/src/feedback/ToastProvider.tsx
nodes.summary: ToastProvider component wrapping goey-toast library. Provides useToast context with notify function supporting success/error/info/warning types, auto title extraction, action buttons, and theme-aware styling.

nodes.name: ToastProvider
nodes.summary: Context provider for toast notifications, wrapping goey-toast with theme support and smart title/description splitting.

nodes.name: useToast
nodes.summary: Hook to access the ToastContext notify function.

nodes.name: ui/src/hooks/useInterval.ts
nodes.summary: useInterval hook that sets up a setInterval with a ref-based callback, accepting a delay in ms or null to pause.

nodes.name: useInterval
nodes.summary: Declarative setInterval hook with ref-stable callback.

nodes.name: ui/src/hooks/useLocalStorage.ts
nodes.summary: useLocalStorage hook that syncs state with localStorage, supporting functional updates.

nodes.name: useLocalStorage
nodes.summary: Hook that reads/writes a value to localStorage with useState integration.

nodes.name: ui/src/index.ts
nodes.summary: Barrel file re-exporting all public UI components, hooks, and utilities from the @code-proxy/ui package.

nodes.name: ui/src/layout/PageBackground.tsx
nodes.summary: PageBackground component renders a full-page container with radial gradient backgrounds and optional animated login variant with conic gradient rotation and pulsing center glow.

nodes.name: PageBackground
nodes.summary: Renders page-level background with decorative gradients and optional login animation.

nodes.name: ui/src/overlays/ConfirmModal.tsx
nodes.summary: ConfirmModal component wraps Modal with a confirmation dialog pattern. Supports danger/primary variants, busy state, custom confirm/cancel text, and contextual icon (trash for danger, alert for primary).

nodes.name: ConfirmModal
nodes.summary: Confirmation dialog modal with danger/primary variants, icon, and action buttons.

nodes.name: ui/src/overlays/ImagePreviewOverlay.tsx
nodes.summary: ImagePreviewOverlay component for full-screen image inspection with: zoom (scroll/pinch), pan via drag, rotation (90-degree increments with snap-to-upright), image gallery navigation (prev/next), download, and keyboard shortcut support.

nodes.name: ImagePreviewOverlay
nodes.summary: Full-screen image preview with zoom, pan, rotate, gallery navigation, and download.

nodes.name: ui/src/overlays/Modal.tsx
nodes.summary: Modal component renders a portal-based dialog with: backdrop blur, enter/exit animations, configurable max-width, header (optional via hideHeader), body with overflow scroll, footer slot, and Escape key dismissal.

nodes.name: Modal
nodes.summary: Portal-rendered modal dialog with animation, backdrop, header, body, and footer slots.

nodes.name: ui/src/overlays/Tooltip.tsx
nodes.summary: Tooltip system with multiple components: TooltipBubble (positioned tooltip), HoverTooltip (hover-triggered inline tooltip), OverflowTooltip (shows only on text overflow), GlobalIconButtonTooltip (auto-detects icon buttons). Handles placement with fallbacks, viewport boundary clamping, and touch support.

nodes.name: TooltipBubble
nodes.summary: Positioned tooltip bubble with viewport-aware placement and fallbacks.

nodes.name: HoverTooltip
nodes.summary: Hover-triggered tooltip wrapper that shows TooltipBubble on mouse hover.

nodes.name: OverflowTooltip
nodes.summary: Tooltip that only activates when the wrapped content overflows its container.

nodes.name: GlobalIconButtonTooltip
nodes.summary: Global tooltip provider that auto-detects icon-only buttons and shows tooltips from data-tooltip or aria-label attributes.

nodes.name: ui/src/primitives/Button.tsx
nodes.summary: Button component with multiple variants (default, primary, secondary, danger/error, success, warning, ghost), sizes (xs/sm/md), icon-only detection with auto-tooltip, and a standalone buttonClassName utility. Handles tooltip suppression for icon-only buttons.

nodes.name: Button
nodes.summary: Versatile button component with variant/size support and auto tooltip on icon-only buttons.

nodes.name: buttonClassName
nodes.summary: Utility function that computes the Tailwind className string for a button given variant, size, and iconOnly flags.
